demographics.lifestyle: They are active on social media, curating their online presence and seeking platforms to celebrate their beloved pet's unique charm.

core_problem: They yearn for a platform to celebrate their pet's unique personality and receive affirmation for their special bond.
brand_angle: One More empowers you to effortlessly showcase your cherished pet's individuality, turning fleeting moments into celebrated memories.
marketing_hero_subtitle: You deserve to celebrate your extraordinary pet, and we make sharing their unique charm simple and rewarding.

marketing_features.title: Effortless Shareability
marketing_features.description: One More provides intuitive tools for easily uploading and sharing your pet's best moments, ensuring they get the attention they deserve.

marketing_features.title: Curated Pet Profiles
marketing_features.description: Showcase your pet's unique quirks and accomplishments with customizable profiles that highlight their individuality and story.

marketing_features.title: Positive Affirmation Hub
marketing_features.description: Connect with a community that genuinely appreciates and validates your pet parenting journey and your pet's adorable antics.

power_phrases: This cat is so orange and i’m so glad he’s mine
My Skippy is a professional Dangler and she is PERFECT.

demographics.lifestyle: They actively seek out niche online groups and forums, valuing genuine connection over fleeting interactions, especially around their passions.

core_problem: They crave a dedicated, understanding community where their intense pet adoration is shared and celebrated without judgment.
brand_angle: One More fosters a vibrant, inclusive community where you'll instantly belong among fellow passionate pet enthusiasts.
marketing_hero_subtitle: You're not just a pet owner; you're part of a passionate family, and we connect you with people who truly understand your unique bond.

marketing_features.title: Exclusive Pet Hubs
marketing_features.description: Discover and join specialized groups and forums tailored to specific pet breeds, quirks, or interests, finding your perfect niche.

marketing_features.title: Meaningful Connections
marketing_features.description: Our platform encourages deeper interactions, allowing you to build lasting friendships with others who share your pet devotion.

marketing_features.title: Judgment-Free Zone
marketing_features.description: Participate in a moderated, positive environment where every pet and parent is celebrated for their unique journey.

power_phrases: Obviously there would be a specific sub for this.
They are my loves and our introduction on the sub.

demographics.lifestyle: Often busy and stressed, they look for quick, joyful escapes and lighthearted content to brighten their day and de-stress.

core_problem: They seek reliable, lighthearted pet content and interactions to inject daily joy and escape from life's everyday stresses.
brand_angle: One More delivers a consistent stream of heartwarming and humorous pet moments, offering instant joy and a delightful break whenever you need it.
marketing_hero_subtitle: You deserve more moments of pure joy, and we bring you endless heartwarming pet content to brighten every single day.

marketing_features.title: Endless Joy Feed
marketing_features.description: Scroll through a personalized feed of adorable, funny, and heartwarming pet content designed to bring instant smiles and laughter.

marketing_features.title: Instant Mood Boost
marketing_features.description: Escape the daily grind with quick, engaging videos and photos that provide a perfect mental reset and a dose of happy.

marketing_features.title: Curated Content Discovery
marketing_features.description: Effortlessly discover new and delightful pet content tailored to your preferences, ensuring a fresh stream of amusement.
